Album.title: Album
Album.description: Represents a synchronized 2026 Copa sticker album progress.

albumCode.description: Unique alphanumeric sharing code for co-updating.

glued.description: Key-value map containing stickerId -> boolean indicating if it is glued.

repeated.description: Key-value map containing stickerId -> integer count of duplicates.

/albums/{albumId}.description: The main collection storing synced Copa albums by their custom sharing code.
